description_long: This object is a modern toilet with a rectangular cistern and a rounded seat, designed for indoor use. The toilet features two prominent cylindrical grab bars mounted on either side of the cistern, likely intended to assist users with mobility challenges. The cistern is boxy and sits atop the bowl, with a flush lever visible on the right side. The base is broad and flat, providing stability, and the overall form is smooth with minimal ornamentation. The grab bars have a metallic appearance, contrasting with the lighter color of the main ceramic body. The seat is closed, and the overall design prioritizes both functionality and accessibility.
description: A modern toilet with a rectangular cistern, rounded seat, and two large metallic grab bars for accessibility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toilet seat, cistern, and both side grab bars, with the flush lever visible on the right.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the grab bar, the side profile of the cistern, and the flush lever.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cistern and both grab bars, with the base and plumbing area visible.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the left grab bar and the side profile of the toilet bowl and cistern.
